title: Section 24
content: 1[24. Burden of proof.--In any proceeding relating to proceeds of crime under this Act,-- (a) in the case of a person charged with the offence of money-laundering under section 3, the Authority or Court shall, unless the contrary is proved, presume that such proceeds of crime are involved in money-laundering; and (b) in the case of any other person the Authority or Court, may presume that such proceeds of crime are involved in money-laundering.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s.19, ibid., for section 24 (w.e.f. 15-2-2013).
